texto: 'Flaubert's Parrot' is an amphibious book in which what appears to be a personal essay about Flaubertian writing is gradually, delicately transformed into an extremely sad novel in which the differences between character, author, and narrator are less clear than they appear at first glance.
explicacao: Citação de Alvaro Enrigue sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “'Flaubert's Parrot' is an amphibious book in which what appears to be a personal essay about Flau…” articula reflexao, character, writing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e writing.
